task_completion.description: Load the liver CT scan and visualize the anatomy in 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application is open with a CT scan loaded. Axial, sagittal, or coronal views show liver tissue and contrast-enhanced vessels.

task_completion.description: Identify and mark the portal vein bifurcation
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Markups' module list or on the slice views, a fiducial point labeled 'Bifurcation' is visible near the split of the main vessel.

task_completion.description: Place landmarks for RPV, LPV, and MPV
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module list shows additional points named 'RPV', 'LPV', and 'MPV'. These points are visible in the slice views marking the vessel origins.

task_completion.description: Measure the diameter of the Main Portal Vein
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler or line measurement tool is active in a slice view, measuring the width of the large portal vein vessel.

task_completion.description: Measure the distance from the tumor to the nearest portal branch
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler or line measurement tool connects a visible tumor mass (lesion) to a nearby vessel branch in the slice view.

task_completion.description: Draft the surgical planning report with required fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or the Slicer Python console shows a JSON structure being written containing keys like 'portal_vein_diameter_mm', 'tumor_vessel_relationship', and 'resectability_assessment'.

task_completion.description: Save the landmarks and report to the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog, terminal listing, or file explorer shows 'portal_landmarks.mrk.json' and 'surgical_planning_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/' folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uses the 3D Slicer GUI for anatomy mapping
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Slicer's Markups module, slice views, and toolbar icons, rather than performing the entire task via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Verify measurements are performed using software tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The diameter and distance values in the report appear derived from visible ruler lines in the Slicer UI, not arbitrary numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the report is generated from the current session
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen copy-pasting a full JSON block from a browser or external document; the data entry correlates with the active Slicer session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is 3D-IRCADb Case 1.5. The portal vein appears as a bright, enhancing Y-shaped structure in the liver. Valid tumor-vessel relationships are 'Clear', 'Close', 'Abutting', 'Involved'.
